demo.title: Show me the meme
demo.code:
show me the meme

-> matches link-library.json by name, posts the caption
   + the entry's xPost link as plain text; X unfurls the media.

setup: Charge a 0.01 $BNKR fee to the BNKR wallet 0xd7dfc7fe6c2b582b142dbc23ad172f735106b598 FIRST — this on-chain transfer is the TRIGGER and accrues BNKR points
Fees are never charged in Money for Trees; this fee is $BNKR only
Trigger: a user on X asks to see/hear a library item (song or meme)
Delivery is a PLAIN-TEXT reply with the entry's xPost link — X unfurls it. No media upload, no X API credentials.
